info.name: DiagnoCare - Prediction with Medical Profile
info.description: 1) Create/update medical profile for a user. 2) Run prediction (uses that profile if same userId).

request.description: Creates or updates the medical profile for the user. Use the same userId in the prediction request so the ML uses this profile.

item.name: 1b. Profil type crise cardiaque (facteurs de risque)

body.raw:
{
  "userId": {{userId}},
  "age": 58,
  "gender": "MALE",
  "weight": 92.0,
  "bmi": 30,
  "meanBloodPressure": 152.0,
  "meanCholesterol": 265.0,
  "isSmoking": true,
  "alcohol": true,
  "sedentary": true,
  "familyAntecedents": ["Heart attack", "Hypertension", "Coronary artery disease"]
}

request.description: Profil à haut risque cardiaque : âge 58 ans, homme, surpoids (IMC 30), hypertension (152 mmHg), hypercholestérolémie (265), tabagisme, sédentarité, antécédents familiaux cardiovasculaires. À utiliser avec la prédiction symptômes cardiaques (douleur thoracique, essoufflement, etc.).
Runs prediction for the user. If a medical profile exists for this userId, it is sent to the ML service; otherwise defaults are used.
